title: Italian Pilaf Casserole
description: A hearty, savory Italian-inspired casserole featuring pilaf, mushrooms, and a blend of cheeses. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the mushrooms in a little bit of oil until tender.
Add the cooked pilaf to the skillet, and stir in the savory and Russian. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the Parmesan and Mozzarella.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the pilaf mixture, followed by the cheese mixture.
Transfer the dish to the preheated oven, and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven, and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
